description_long: This bird has a sleek, elongated body with predominantly dark gray to black plumage and a striking, angular silhouette. Its wings are long and sharply pointed, extending far beyond its body, giving it an impressive wingspan. The head is adorned with a spiky crest, and the face features a long, pointed yellow beak and expressive, round eyes. The legs are thin and yellow, ending in three forward-facing toes and one backward-facing toe, all tipped with sharp claws. The tail is long and forked, with feathers that taper to fine points. The overall appearance is dynamic and slightly stylized, suggesting a bird adapted for flight and agility.
description: A sleek, dark gray bird with a spiky crest, long pointed wings, a yellow beak, and a forked tail. Its thin yellow legs and sharp claws add to its agile, dynamic look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bird's symmetrical wingspan, spiky crest, and direct gaze with both eyes visible.
description_view_1: Three-quarter rear view highlights the spiky crest, open beak, and the layered structure of the wings and tail.
description_view_2: Rear view emphasizes the full wingspan, forked tail, and the alignment of the legs and body.
description_view_3: Side view displays the profile of the head, beak, and crest, as well as the curvature of the wings and tail.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid dark gray to black with subtle gradients and a spiky crest
